name: lightweight-charts
when_to_use: 展示价格/OHLC 时间序列、蜡烛图、面积/基线图并要金融级交互(缩放、十字光标、多窗格同步、海量 bar 平移)时用它;普通折线时间序列用 uplot/Chart.js。v5 API:系列用 addSeries(CandlestickSeries, …),不是 v4 的 addCandlestickSeries()。
why_valuable: TradingView 金融引擎:蜡烛体几何 + 精确 OHLC 坐标 + 十字光标联动 + 大数据平移,AI 手写蜡烛体与坐标必错且卡。

data_in.note: v5 API。candlestick/bar 系列吃 {time,open,high,low,close};line/area/baseline 系列改吃 {time,value}。time 可为 'YYYY-MM-DD' 字符串、UNIX 秒(UTCTimestamp)或 {year,month,day}(BusinessDay);同一系列须按 time 升序、无重复。

candles.time: string | number | {year,month,day} —— 'YYYY-MM-DD' / UNIX 秒 / BusinessDay;升序无重

spec.note: canvas 图读容器宽度;默认 height 400px,禁 vh。boot 传 { width: el.clientWidth, height };尺寸跟随可用 autoSize 选项或 chart.applyOptions({width})。

example._why: 钉死 v5 candlestick 数据 {time,open,high,low,close},time 升序。

uplink: display/local-interact 默认不上行;十字光标/可见区间/点击若需外传,由消费 AI 接 chart.subscribeCrosshairMove、timeScale().subscribeVisibleTimeRangeChange 等原生订阅并按载体处理。

carriers.widget: supported:样式附到图表自有 wrapper(非 head)故天然 shadow 安全;ResizeObserver 观察容器,chart.remove() 清理。
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN(fancy-canvas 已内联),无 worker/wasm/uplink。

isolation.evidence: v5.2.0,命名导出(+esm: createChart,CandlestickSeries,LineSeries,AreaSeries,BarSeries,BaselineSeries,HistogramSeries…)。createChart(container:string|HTMLElement, options?):IChartApi(dts L212)。v5 系列 API:chart.addSeries<T>(definition:SeriesDefinition<T>, options?, paneIndex?):ISeriesApi(dts L1640)——即 addSeries(CandlestickSeries, …);dts 里 2 处 addCandlestickSeries(L2566/2581)仅为迁移 JSDoc 注释,非真实方法。OhlcData{time,open,high,low,close}(L3444,extends WhitespaceData),SingleValueData{time,value}(L4309);Time=UTCTimestamp(Nominal<number>,秒)|BusinessDay|string(L4987)。globalStyleInjection=no:归属署名 logo 的 <style>(this.Uv,innerText a#tv-attr-logo{...})被 this.jv.appendChild(this.Uv) 附到图表自有 wrapper 元素、非 document.head——挂进 shadow 时随容器留在 shadow,故 shadow 安全。globalDomMutation=conditional:唯一 body 触碰是 CSS 颜色字符串→RGBA 解析时临时 createElement("div")(display:none)appendChild 到 body 读取后即弃,非持久图表 DOM。globalEvents=no:用 ResizeObserver 观察容器自适应,remove() 时清理,无 window 监听。

en.when_to_use: Use it to display price/OHLC time series, candlesticks, area/baseline charts, and financial-grade interaction (zoom, crosshair, synchronized panes, panning across many bars). For ordinary line time series use uplot/Chart.js. v5 API: add series with addSeries(CandlestickSeries, ...), not v4 addCandlestickSeries().
en.why_valuable: TradingView's financial engine provides candlestick geometry, precise OHLC coordinates, synchronized crosshairs, and high-volume panning. AI hand-written candlesticks and coordinates are inevitably wrong and slow.

data_in.note: v5 API. candlestick/bar series accept {time,open,high,low,close}; line/area/baseline series instead accept {time,value}. time may be a 'YYYY-MM-DD' string, UNIX seconds (UTCTimestamp), or {year,month,day} (BusinessDay). Within a series it must be ascending by time with no duplicates.

candles.time: string | number | {year,month,day} -- 'YYYY-MM-DD' / UNIX seconds / BusinessDay; ascending and unique

spec.note: The canvas chart reads container width; default height is 400px and vh is prohibited. boot passes { width: el.clientWidth, height }. Track size with the autoSize option or chart.applyOptions({width}).
